name: KikoFlu Source
subtitle: KikoFlu AltStore Source
description: AltStore source for KikoFlu - A cross-platform Kikoeru client

apps.name: KikoFlu
apps.subtitle: Kikoeru Client
apps.localizedDescription: A cross-platform client for browsing and playing Kikoeru server content. Features include background playback, subtitle system, offline download, multi-language support, and more.

versions.localizedDescription:
新增：Linux支持、多语言支持、快捷翻译按钮、推荐系统、悬浮字幕触摸开关、已下载搜索排序、日志界面、字幕库索引优化、本地文件扫描、低认同度标签区分显示
修复：最大并行下载数保护、悬浮字幕多行显示、UI动画修复、字幕解码稳定性、iOS无法保存文件
New: Linux support, multi-language support, quick translation button, recommendation system, floating subtitle touch toggle, downloaded items search sorting, log interface, subtitle library indexing optimization, local file scanning, and differentiated display for low-confidence tags.
Fixed: maximum concurrent download limit protection, multi-line display for floating subtitles, UI animation fixes, improved subtitle decoding stability, and an issue where files could not be saved on iOS.
